name: Creme De Menthe Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Hershey's fudge topping (thick enough for spreading)
8 oz Cool whip (thick enough for spreading)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake according to package directions and add 3 tablespoons of green creme de menthe.
2. Bake as directed and let cool completely.
3. While cooling, mix the thawed Cool Whip with the remaining 3 tablespoons of green creme de menthe until well combined.
4. Once the cake is fully cooled, frost it with the fudge topping.
5. Just before serving, frost the top and sides with the minted Cool Whip.
(If you have difficulty finding green creme de menthe, use any thick fudge topping and add 3 tablespoons of a desired color extract or food coloring to achieve the desired color.)
